title: Subjunctive chunks: quiero que
subtitle: Use a few useful wish phrases.
overview: A2 does not need every subjunctive rule at once.
Learn common chunks that native speakers use often.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I need you to help me.
I prefer that we talk tomorrow.

items.en: I want you to listen to this sentence.

items.es: Espero que tengas un buen día.
items.en: I hope you have a good day.

items.es: Necesito que me mandes la dirección.
items.en: I need you to send me the address.
I prefer that we leave early.

items.es: Mi profesor quiere que practique más.
items.en: My teacher wants me to practice more.
